transcript_preview: Seši desmit. Klausies un lasi. Annai patīk iepirkties akciju laikā. Tāda labas preces var nopirkt par daudz zemākām cenām. Tikai viņai nepatīk to darīt vienai. Tādēļ Anna zvana ievai un aicina kopā iepirkties. Labrīt, Ieva! Ejam uz lielveik
translation_preview: Six ten. Listen and read. Anna likes shopping during the stock. Such good goods can be purchased at much lower prices. Just she doesn't like to do it alone. That's why Anna calls you to shop together. Good morning, Eve! Let's go to the supe
